name: 祭品的逆襲 The Counterattack of Sacrifice
short_description: Horror adventure game, the scene combines Western and Eastern elements, content tends to be scary, dark, weird, and exotic, player will control an ordinary man and help him escape from a strange village controlled by a cult.
detailed_description:
"The Counterattack Of Sacrifice" is a horror adventure game that explores the game world through the use of a first-person perspective, the scene combines Western and Eastern elements, content tends to be scary, dark, weird, and exotic, player will control an ordinary man and help him escape from a strange village controlled by a cult.

Summary : It tells the story of the protagonist's parents who wanted to visit relatives who lived far away, but later lost all news due to unknown reasons, in order to find the truth, the protagonist decided to go alone...

After arriving at the destination, the protagonist discovered a strange mountain road.

Go deeper...and come to a dead village.

He realized that this was not the place he should be, and when he wanted to escape, it was too late.

This eerie village has an unknown past that is waiting for players to experience it for themselves.
